from __future__ import annotations

import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from scipy import stats
from scipy.stats import spearmanr

PRIMARY_COLOR = "#1F78B4"
SECONDARY_COLOR = "#D62728"
PROMOTED = "#1F78B4"
SUPPRESSED = "#D62728"
BACKGROUND_FEP = PROMOTED
FEP_ENRICHED = SUPPRESSED
FIT_LINE = "#1F1F1F"
ZERO = "#333333"
TEXT = "#252525"

FEATURE_ORDER = [
    "OPR",
    "NaHCO3_P",
    "DOC",
    "log_nosZ_norB_Ratio",
    "NH4_NO3_Ratio",
    "FeII",
    "OPR_FeP",
    "__C_OPR_BY_FEP__",
]

DISPLAY = {
    "OPR": "ORP",
    "NaHCO3_P": r"NaHCO$_3$-P",
    "DOC": "DOC",
    "OPR_FeP": "ORP x FeP",
    "FeII": "Fe(II)",
    "NH4_NO3_Ratio": r"NH$_4^+$/NO$_3^-$",
    "log_nosZ_norB_Ratio": r"log$_{10}$(nosZ/norB)",
}

_fl9_data = None
_fl9_stats = None
_opr_fep_df = None


def configure_matplotlib() -> None:
    plt.rcParams.update(
        {
            "font.family": ["Times New Roman", "SimHei", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans CJK SC", "Arial"],
            "mathtext.fontset": "custom",
            "mathtext.rm": "Times New Roman",
            "mathtext.it": "Times New Roman:italic",
            "mathtext.bf": "Times New Roman:bold",
            "font.size": 9.5,
            "axes.spines.top": True,
            "axes.spines.right": True,
            "axes.linewidth": 1.0,
            "axes.unicode_minus": False,
            "legend.frameon": False,
            "pdf.fonttype": 42,
            "ps.fonttype": 42,
            "svg.fonttype": "none",
        }
    )


def style_full_box(ax: plt.Axes) -> None:
    ax.grid(False)
    ax.set_facecolor("white")
    for spine in ax.spines.values():
        spine.set_visible(True)
        spine.set_linewidth(0.95)
        spine.set_color("black")
    ax.tick_params(axis="both", direction="out", width=0.85, length=3.8, colors="black", labelsize=9.5)


def fmt(x: float | int | str | None, digits: int = 3) -> str:
    try:
        if pd.isna(x):
            return "NA"
        return f"{float(x):.{digits}f}"
    except Exception:
        return str(x)


def p_fmt(x: float | int | str | None) -> str:
    try:
        x = float(x)
    except Exception:
        return "NA"
    if np.isnan(x):
        return "NA"
    if x < 0.001:
        return "<0.001"
    return f"{x:.3f}"


def linear_fit(x: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, float]:
    mask = np.isfinite(x) & np.isfinite(y)
    x = x[mask]
    y = y[mask]
    if len(x) < 3:
        return np.array([]), np.array([]), np.nan
    slope, intercept = np.polyfit(x, y, 1)
    pred = slope * x + intercept
    ss_res = float(np.sum((y - pred) ** 2))
    ss_tot = float(np.sum((y - y.mean()) ** 2))
    r2 = 1 - ss_res / ss_tot if ss_tot > 0 else np.nan
    grid = np.linspace(x.min(), x.max(), 100)
    return grid, slope * grid + intercept, r2


def r2_score_observed(y: pd.Series, y_pred: np.ndarray) -> float:
    y_arr = y.to_numpy(dtype=float)
    ss_res = float(np.sum((y_arr - y_pred) ** 2))
    ss_tot = float(np.sum((y_arr - y_arr.mean()) ** 2))
    return np.nan if ss_tot == 0 else 1 - ss_res / ss_tot


def p_text(p: float) -> str:
    if not np.isfinite(p):
        return "NA"
    if p < 0.001:
        return "<0.001"
    return f"{p:.3f}"


def plot_fl9_panel(ax: plt.Axes, data: pd.DataFrame, stats_df: pd.DataFrame, feature: str) -> None:
    tmp = data[[feature, "LNRR", "Response_Group"]].dropna().copy()
    colors = tmp["Response_Group"].map({"Promoted": PROMOTED, "Suppressed": SUPPRESSED}).fillna("#999999")
    ax.scatter(
        tmp[feature],
        tmp["LNRR"],
        c=colors,
        s=34,
        alpha=0.75,
        edgecolors="white",
        linewidth=0.45,
        zorder=3,
    )
    grid, fit, r2 = linear_fit(tmp[feature].to_numpy(dtype=float), tmp["LNRR"].to_numpy(dtype=float))
    if len(grid):
        ax.plot(grid, fit, color=FIT_LINE, linewidth=1.8, zorder=2)
    ax.axhline(0, color=ZERO, linestyle="--", linewidth=0.9, zorder=1)

    row = stats_df.loc[stats_df["feature"].eq(feature)].iloc[0]
    ax.text(
        0.04,
        0.96,
        r"$R^2$"
        + f"={fmt(r2)}\n"
        + r"$\rho$"
        + f"={fmt(row['spearman_rho_with_LNRR'])}, p={p_fmt(row['spearman_p'])}",
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        ha="left",
        va="top",
        fontsize=7.3,
        color=TEXT,
    )
    ax.set_xlabel(DISPLAY[feature], fontsize=10.5)
    ax.set_ylabel("")
    ax.set_title(DISPLAY[feature], loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    style_full_box(ax)


def plot_c_panel(ax: plt.Axes, opr_fep_df: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    df = opr_fep_df.copy()
    fep_thr = df["FeP"].mean()
    df["FeP_stratum"] = np.where(df["FeP"] <= fep_thr, "Background FeP", "FeP-enriched")
    colors = {"Background FeP": BACKGROUND_FEP, "FeP-enriched": FEP_ENRICHED}
    fit_r2: dict[str, float] = {}

    for label in ["Background FeP", "FeP-enriched"]:
        sub = df[df["FeP_stratum"].eq(label)]
        ax.scatter(
            sub["OPR"],
            sub["LNRR"],
            s=34,
            color=colors[label],
            alpha=0.78,
            edgecolor="white",
            linewidth=0.45,
            zorder=3,
            label=f"{label} (n={len(sub)})",
        )
        if len(sub) >= 5:
            slope, intercept, _, _ = stats.theilslopes(sub["LNRR"], sub["OPR"])
            fit_r2[label] = r2_score_observed(sub["LNRR"], intercept + slope * sub["OPR"].to_numpy(dtype=float))
            xs = np.linspace(sub["OPR"].min(), sub["OPR"].max(), 100)
            ax.plot(xs, intercept + slope * xs, color=colors[label], linewidth=1.8, zorder=2)

    ax.axhline(0, color=ZERO, linestyle="--", linewidth=0.9, zorder=1)
    ax.set_xlabel("ORP (AgCl, mV)", fontsize=10.5)
    ax.set_ylabel("")
    ax.set_title("ORP by FeP", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    style_full_box(ax)

    notes = []
    for label in ["Background FeP", "FeP-enriched"]:
        sub = df[df["FeP_stratum"].eq(label)]
        rho, p_val = spearmanr(sub["OPR"], sub["LNRR"])
        short_label = "Background" if label == "Background FeP" else "Enriched"
        notes.append(f"{short_label}: " + r"$\rho$" + f"={rho:.2f}, p={p_text(p_val)}, " + r"$R^2$" + f"={fit_r2.get(label, np.nan):.2f}")
    notes.append(r"Threshold = mean FeP")
    ax.text(0.04, 0.96, "\n".join(notes), transform=ax.transAxes, ha="left", va="top", fontsize=6.4, color=TEXT)


def load_data() -> pd.DataFrame:
    global _fl9_data, _fl9_stats, _opr_fep_df
    _fl9_stats = pd.DataFrame(_uploaded_data)
    _fl9_data = pd.read_csv(_uploaded_file_paths["FL9_机制重绘输入矩阵.csv"])
    _opr_fep_df = pd.read_excel(_uploaded_file_paths["OPR_FeP二维交互响应图_绘图数据.xlsx"], sheet_name="输入数据与预测")
    return _fl9_stats


def build_figure(df: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    configure_matplotlib()
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 4, figsize=(11.3, 5.9), dpi=600)
    fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
    axes = axes.ravel()

    for ax, item in zip(axes, FEATURE_ORDER):
        if item == "__C_OPR_BY_FEP__":
            plot_c_panel(ax, _opr_fep_df)
        else:
            plot_fl9_panel(ax, _fl9_data, _fl9_stats, item)

    for i, ax in enumerate(axes):
        if i % 4 != 0:
            ax.tick_params(labelleft=False)
        else:
            ax.tick_params(labelleft=True)

    handles = [
        plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker="o", color="none", markerfacecolor=PROMOTED, markeredgecolor="white", markersize=6.5, label="Promoted / Background FeP"),
        plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker="o", color="none", markerfacecolor=SUPPRESSED, markeredgecolor="white", markersize=6.5, label="Suppressed / FeP-enriched"),
    ]
    fig.legend(handles=handles, loc="lower center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, 0.01), ncol=2, fontsize=8.0, frameon=False)
    fig.supylabel("LnRR", x=0.008, fontsize=12, fontweight="bold")
    fig.suptitle("FL9 continuous relationships with LnRR", x=0.02, y=1.02, ha="left", fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")
    fig.tight_layout(rect=(0, 0.055, 1, 0.98))


df = load_data()
build_figure(df)
